events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Equipment bonding, CSST gas line not bonded. Work rough-complete. Condition installed-defective. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? CSST gas line not bonded is a defect, potential hazard from lightning/fault energy causing perforation. Risk high? Could be critical? Let's assess. CSST not bonded can lead to gas leaks/fire/explosion due to arcing perforation. Risk likely high or critical. Since not bonded is a code violation and dangerous, decision fail. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: CSST gas piping lacks required bonding jumper to electrical grounding system; no bonding clamp/connection visible; potential for electrical arcing/perforation. Actions: install bonding jumper per NEC 250.104(B) or 250.104? Actually gas piping bonding: NEC 250.104(B) Other Metal Pipelines. CSST often requires bonding to building grounding electrode system. 250.30 is separately derived systems? Maybe not relevant. But reference material includes NEC 250.104, 250.30. Use them. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80. value 0. confidence 1.0. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose.

events.label: response

  "findings": [
    "CSST gas line is installed but has no visible bonding jumper/connection to the grounding electrode system",
    "Missing bonding clamp or conductor at the CSST termination/fitting",
    "Condition violates NEC bonding requirements for other metal piping and creates arcing/perforation risk"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved bonding jumper from the CSST gas piping to the building grounding electrode system",
    "Verify bonding conductor size and connection points per NEC 250.104(B)",
    "Inspect and test continuity of the bond before close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "CSST gas piping must be bonded to the grounding electrode system to prevent electrical fault or lightning energy from arcing and perforating the tubing. The absence of any bonding connection at the rough-complete stage is a non-compliant, hazardous defect requiring correction before the work can pass.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"]
}
